entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 49
entries.excerpt: “And Jacob called his sons, and said to them: Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you what shall befall you in the last days” (Gen 49:1). For the sake of Joseph, who had come to his father, and for the sake of his father, who was near to death, Jacob’s sons gathered on that day and came to their father’s house, since they did not live in one house but each separately. Joseph sat, and the brothers surrounded him and waited — not so much to receive a blessing or a curse, as to learn what should “befall them in the last days.…
